svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"05_s_right_left","label":"Right-left S curve","topology":"Keep one main road from B0 to T0 with a readable reverse S curve: first right, then left, then into the castle.","sockets":["B0","T0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035}}}
